output: Completed batch T5 validation. The throwaway repro script was created, run successfully against the off-center free-edge, off-center interior-boundary, and free-clip snap-to-sibling scenarios, then deleted. `src/tools/video-editor/lib/resize-math.test.ts`, the combined `useClipResize.test.tsx` + `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` run, and the broader `src/tools/video-editor` suite all passed. Structural greps for `kind: 'group-child-boundary'`, `kind: 'group-edge'`, `startGroupEdgeResize`, and `[resize-diag]` in the resize lifecycle/wiring files returned zero hits. The narrowed `TimelineCanvas` lifecycle block count (`updateResize`, `endResize`, `handleResizePointerDown`) decreased from `418` lines at `HEAD` to `389` lines currently. Full app `tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit` still fails due unrelated pre-existing errors outside `src/tools/video-editor/`, while a filtered scan for `src/tools/video-editor/` returned no matches. The checkpoint was written to `.megaplan/plans/collapse-the-three-parallel-20260408-1934/execution_batch_5.json`.
deviations: Used `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts ...` because bare `vitest` is not on PATH in this workspace.
The first repro-script attempt used `tsx` and failed under sandbox IPC restrictions (`listen EPERM`), so the repro was rerun successfully as a plain Node `.mjs` script before being deleted.

Full `tsc -p tsconfig.app.json --noEmit` still reports unrelated pre-existing errors outside `src/tools/video-editor/`; validation therefore included the required full run plus a filtered scan confirming no `src/tools/video-editor/` matches.
`TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` still emits one `[PERF] render-storm` stderr line during the audio clamp test, but the full targeted run and the broader video-editor suite both pass.
